genres.name: Action
genres.description: High-energy physical stunts, chases, battles, and destructive crises.

genres.name: Adventure
genres.description: Hazardous or exciting experiences, searches, expeditions, and quests.

genres.name: Animation
genres.description: Wholly or partially animated films using any form of animation.

genres.name: Comedy
genres.description: Events intended to make someone laugh, from droll to zany.

genres.name: Crime
genres.description: Criminal justice system, moral gray areas, and law enforcement.

genres.name: Documentary
genres.description: Real personages and events, stand-up comedy, and concert performances.

genres.name: Drama
genres.description: Emotional narratives, character development, and serious themes.

genres.name: Family
genres.description: Universally accepted viewing for younger audiences and children.

genres.name: Fantasy
genres.description: Supernatural elements, magical worlds, and mythical creatures.

genres.name: History
genres.description: Historical events, biographies, and period pieces.

genres.name: Horror
genres.description: Terrifying or macabre events designed to evoke fear and suspense.

genres.name: Music
genres.description: Musical performances, music-driven narratives, and concert films.

genres.name: Mystery
genres.description: Puzzles, investigations, and uncovering hidden truths.

genres.name: Romance
genres.description: Love stories, relationship dynamics, and emotional connections.

genres.name: Science Fiction
genres.description: Futuristic concepts, advanced technology, and space exploration.

genres.name: TV Movie
genres.description: Feature-length films produced specifically for television broadcast.

genres.name: Thriller
genres.description: Tension, suspense, and anticipation of a terrible event.

genres.name: War
genres.description: Military conflicts, battles, and the human cost of warfare.

genres.name: Western
genres.description: American Old West, frontier life, and cowboy culture.
